declarations.name: NotectlEditor
declarations.description: A modern, accessible rich text editor shipped as a single Web Component. Features immutable state, transaction-based architecture, and a plugin system that powers every feature.

members.name: commands

type.text: { toggleBold(): boolean; toggleItalic(): boolean; toggleUnderline(): boolean; undo(): void; redo(): void; selectAll(): void; }

members.description: Convenience accessors for common formatting commands.

members.name: isReadOnly
members.description: Returns whether the editor is in read-only mode.

members.name: init

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Optional editor configuration (plugins, theme, placeholder, etc.).

members.description: Initializes the editor with the given config. Automatically called on connectedCallback, but can be called manually for deferred initialization.

members.name: whenReady
members.description: Returns a promise that resolves when the editor is fully initialized and all plugins are ready.

members.name: configure

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Partial configuration to merge into the current editor config.

members.description: Updates configuration at runtime (e.g. placeholder, readonly, dir).

members.name: registerPlugin

parameters.name: plugin
parameters.description: A plugin instance to register.

members.description: Registers a plugin before initialization. Must be called before init() or DOM insertion.

members.name: configurePlugin

parameters.name: pluginId
parameters.description: The ID of the plugin to configure.

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Configuration object to pass to the plugin.

members.description: Configures a plugin at runtime.

members.name: getService

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Typed service key registered by a plugin.

members.description: Returns a registered plugin service by typed key.

members.name: onPluginEvent

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: Typed event key registered by a plugin.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked when the event fires.

members.description: Subscribes to a plugin event. Returns an unsubscribe function.

members.name: getContentHTML

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Options for HTML export. Pass { pretty: true } for formatted output, or { cssMode: 'classes' } for CSS class-based export returning a ContentCSSResult.

members.description: Returns sanitized HTML representation of the document. Supports pretty-printing and CSS class export for round-trip.

members.name: setContentHTML

parameters.name: html
parameters.description: HTML string to set as content.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: Options for HTML import, including optional styleMap for class-based round-trip.

members.description: Sets the editor content from an HTML string (sanitized). Accepts optional styleMap for class-based round-trip.

members.name: getJSON
members.description: Returns the document as an immutable JSON-serializable Document object.

members.name: setJSON

parameters.name: doc
parameters.description: A Document object to set as editor content.

members.description: Replaces the editor content with the given Document object.

members.name: getText
members.description: Returns the plain text content of the editor.

members.name: isEmpty
members.description: Returns true if the editor contains only a single empty paragraph.

members.name: can

type.text: { toggleBold(): boolean; toggleItalic(): boolean; toggleUnderline(): boolean; undo(): boolean; redo(): boolean; selectAll(): boolean; }

members.description: Returns an object with methods that check whether each built-in command can be executed in the current state.

members.name: canExecuteCommand

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of a registered command.

members.description: Returns whether a named command (registered by a plugin) can be executed in the current state.

members.name: executeCommand

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of a registered command.

members.description: Executes a named command registered by a plugin.

members.name: getState
members.description: Returns the current immutable editor state.

members.name: dispatch

parameters.name: tr
parameters.description: A transaction to apply. Routed through plugin middleware before application.

members.description: Dispatches a transaction (routed through middleware if any). Respects read-only mode.

members.name: on

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: The event name ('ready', 'focus', 'blur', 'stateChange', 'selectionChange').

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: Callback invoked when the event fires.

members.description: Registers a type-safe event listener.

members.name: off

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: The event name.

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The previously registered callback to remove.

members.description: Removes a previously registered event listener.

members.name: setTheme

parameters.name: theme
parameters.description: A built-in preset ('light' | 'dark' | 'system') or a custom Theme object.

members.description: Changes the editor theme at runtime.

members.name: getTheme
members.description: Returns the current theme setting.

members.name: getPaperSize
members.description: Returns the currently configured paper size, or undefined if using fluid layout.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Tears down the editor, disconnects plugins, and cleans up DOM resources.

attributes.name: placeholder
attributes.description: Placeholder text shown when the editor is empty.

attributes.name: readonly
attributes.description: When present, puts the editor into read-only mode.

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: Sets the built-in theme preset. Defaults to 'light'.

attributes.name: paper-size
attributes.description: Sets a fixed paper size for WYSIWYG layout. Omit for fluid layout.

events.name: ready
events.description: Fired when the editor has been fully initialized and is ready for interaction.

events.name: focus
events.description: Fired when the editor content area receives focus.

events.name: blur
events.description: Fired when the editor content area loses focus.

events.name: stateChange

type.text: CustomEvent<{ oldState: EditorState; newState: EditorState; transaction: Transaction }>

events.description: Fired after every state transition, providing the old state, new state, and the applied transaction.

events.name: selectionChange
events.description: Fired when the cursor or selection changes.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-fg-muted
cssProperties.description: Muted foreground color for secondary text.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-border-focus
cssProperties.description: Border color when the editor is focused.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-primary-muted
cssProperties.description: Muted variant of the primary color.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-danger-muted
cssProperties.description: Muted variant of the danger color.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-shadow
cssProperties.description: Box shadow color for elevated surfaces.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-focus-ring
cssProperties.description: Focus ring color for keyboard navigation.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-code-block-bg
cssProperties.description: Code block background color. Defaults to --notectl-surface-raised.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-code-block-color
cssProperties.description: Code block text color. Defaults to --notectl-fg.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-content-min-height
cssProperties.description: Minimum height of the content area. Defaults to 400px.

cssProperties.name: --notectl-paper-viewport-bg
cssProperties.description: Background of the paper viewport when in paper mode.

declarations.name: createEditor

parameters.name: config
parameters.description: Optional editor configuration (plugins, theme, placeholder, etc.).

declarations.description: Factory function that creates and initializes a <notectl-editor> element.
